# matomo_site (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "matomo_site" "main" {
  name     = "My Website"
  urls     = ["https://www.example.com"]
  timezone = "America/New_York"
  currency = "USD"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The site's name.
- `urls` (List of String) URLs of the site (at least one is required). The first URL is the site's main URL; additional URLs are treated as aliases by Matomo's tracking.

### Optional

- `currency` (String) The site's currency code, e.g. "USD".
- `timezone` (String) The site's timezone, e.g. "UTC" or "America/New_York".

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The site's numeric ID, assigned by Matomo on creation.
